name: KeeperHub
description: Expose KeeperHub workflow automation tools to OpenClaw agents via KeeperHub's remote MCP server.

apiKey.label: KeeperHub API key
apiKey.help: Organisation API key from KeeperHub. Can also be provided with KH_API_KEY.

baseUrl.label: KeeperHub MCP URL
baseUrl.help: Override only for development or self-hosted KeeperHub MCP endpoints.
